ProjectsData.title: projects
ProjectsData.description: Here are some of my recent projects. Click on the links to see the live demo or the source code.

project1.title: Baver
project1.description: BAVER is your partner for complete water, gas, and heating installation and service.

project2.title: Designo Web App
project2.description: Designo is a web app that provides users with a wide range of design services, including graphic design, web design, and branding. It offers a user-friendly interface and personalized recommendations based on user preferences.

project3.title: E-commerce Web App
project3.description: E-commerce web app is a platform that provides users with a wide range of shopping options, including products from various categories. It offers a user-friendly interface and personalized recommendations based on user preferences.
